summary: 1 film announcement, 1 TV announcement across 2 trades.

film.title: Sister Nibedita
film.talent: Celina Jaitly as Sister Nibedita; Ram Kamal Mukherjee
film.announcement: Celina Jaitly returns to the big screen in the role of Sister Nibedita, the Irish-born disciple of Swami Vivekananda.

tv.title: Untitled Larry David HBO Show
tv.talent: Rob Reiner as George Washington; Larry David
tv.announcement: Rob Reiner cast in a secret final role as George Washington in Larry David's HBO show.
